function.name: get_route_distance
function.description: Calculate driving distance between two city names or addresses.
function.long_description: First resolves location names to geographic coordinates using the Open-Meteo Geocoding API, then calculates the driving distance using the OSRM road network service.

start_location.description: The starting city or address (e.g., 'London' or '1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA')

example_user_queries: What is the route distance from Times Square, New York to Central Park, New York?
Calculate the route distance between San Francisco Airport and San Jose Downtown.
Get driving distance from Chicago Union Station to O Hare Airport.
Find the route distance from Seattle Space Needle to Pike Place Market.
How far is it by route from Dallas Love Field to Fort Worth Stockyards?
Measure the route distance between Miami Beach and Orlando Downtown.
Show the road distance from Austin City Hall to Houston City Hall.
Get the route distance from Golden Gate Bridge to Stanford University.
Calculate distance by route from Boston Logan Airport to Harvard Square.
Find route mileage between Los Angeles Union Station and Santa Monica Pier.
